findings.issue: Traditional-form character '対' used in simplified Chinese text
findings.evidence: Choice B zh contains '対' — should be '对' (simplified). Found: '结対编程'

findings.issue: Page 262 has stage6_verdict=WARN (all other content pages are PASS)
findings.evidence: stage6_verdict field = 'WARN'; may indicate upstream OCR or classification issue needing review

findings.issue: Section 07-01 zh title inconsistent across pages: '三大约束' (p266) vs '三大制约' (p267)
findings.evidence: p266 section zh='项目管理与三大约束'; p267 section zh='项目管理与三大制约'. Both should use the same term; '约束' and '制约' are synonyms in Chinese PM context but inconsistency is confusing.

findings.issue: Grammar error in Japanese definition: 実務に → 実務として/実務で
findings.evidence: jp def: '...専門知識を持った人員。実務にプロジェクトを行う。' — particle 'に' is unnatural; correct form is '実務としてプロジェクトに取り組む' or '実際にプロジェクトを行う'

findings.issue: zh surface '项目型组织' adds '型' not present in jp 'プロジェクト組織' or en 'Project Organization'
findings.evidence: Minor scope expansion in zh surface. Not incorrect but worth noting for consistency.

findings.issue: PMBOK 5-process groups listed out of standard order: '終結、監視' / 'Closing, Monitoring' — standard is Monitoring&Controlling before Closing
findings.evidence: jp: '立上げ、計画、実行、終結、監視'; standard PMBOK order is '立上げ→計画→実行→監視・コントロール→終結'. zh '启动、计划、执行、收尾、监控' has same ordering error.

findings.issue: PMBOK process group '監視' is abbreviated; full term is '監視・コントロール' (Monitoring & Controlling)
findings.evidence: jp table cell: '監視' only. This is a simplification common in introductory IT Passport materials.

findings.issue: Subject confusion in Stakeholder Management row: 'プロジェクトが効率的にプロジェクトに参加' — 'プロジェクト' used twice; second should be subject (ステークホルダ)
findings.evidence: jp: 'ステークホルダ(利害関係者)を特定し、プロジェクトが効率的にプロジェクトに参加できるように調整する' — first 'プロジェクト' should be 'ステークホルダ(利害関係者)が'. zh correctly translates as '使其（利益相关者）能高效地参与项目'. EN also correct: 'so they can participate'. jp is the error source.

findings.issue: PMBOK knowledge area name mismatch: table uses 'プロジェクトスケジュールマネジメント' (PMBOK6 name) but glossary has 'プロジェクトタイムマネジメント' (PMBOK5 name)
findings.evidence: Glossary entry key is 'プロジェクトタイムマネジメント'; table uses updated PMBOK6 name. Inconsistency between page content and glossary reference term.

summary: Chunk 25 (pages 262-271) trilingual atomic-leaf audit complete. 24 leaves checked across 10 pages. 1 CRITICAL defect: subject-confusion copy-paste error in PMBOK Stakeholder Management table row (p270, jp). 5 WARNs: stage6=WARN on p262; traditional-form character in zh (p262); section-title zh inconsistency '约束' vs '制约' (p266/267); jp grammar error in プロジェクトメンバー def (p267); PMBOK 5-process group order reversed (p270); PMBOK6 vs PMBOK5 schedule/time terminology mismatch in glossary (p270). 2 INFOs: zh surface adds '型' not in jp/en (p267); '監視' abbreviates '監視・コントロール' (p270).
